description_long: This armchair features a regal and ornate design, with a high, straight back adorned with decorative gold accents and circular medallions. The seat and backrest are upholstered in rich, deep red leather or faux leather, bordered by gold rivets that add to its luxurious appearance. The armrests are solid, angular, and finished with gold detailing, matching the gold-capped feet that resemble animal paws. The frame is predominantly black, providing a striking contrast to the red and gold elements. The back of the chair is plain and solid black, emphasizing the decorative front and sides. This armchair exudes a sense of authority and grandeur, making it suitable for formal or ceremonial urban settings such as city halls or historic buildings.
description: A luxurious, high-backed armchair with red leather upholstery, ornate gold accents, and a black frame, exuding a regal and formal appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high backrest with gold medallions, red cushioned seat and back, and gold-capped feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, angular armrest with gold detailing and the depth of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, solid black back with minimal decoration.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest design and the gold-capped foot detail.
attribute_armrest_design: solid, angular, black with gold detailing
attribute_backrest_style: high, straight, ornate with gold medallions and decorative crest
attribute_leg_type: straight black legs with gold animal paw feet
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid red with gold rivet border
